EN ID
Reserve a Seat
Micro-roastery & slow bar · Jakarta harvest vol. 04

From the highlands
to the slow bar.

Roots & Acre is an Indonesian micro-roastery and reservation-only slow bar in North Jakarta. We walk the islands’ finest specialty farms and roast each lot by hand in micro-batches — poured at our twelve-seat slow bar, or shipped fresh to your door.

Buy the Harvest Reserve a Slow Bar Seat
Cafés & green buyers — wholesale & export inquiries →
The harvest
Buy the beans

Fresh-roasted single origins from across the islands — on Tokopedia, Shopee, or straight through WhatsApp.

See where to buy →
The Bar & Lab
Sit with us

Twelve seats, one pour at a time — reserve on WhatsApp for our slow bar in Jakarta.

Where to find us

Take the harvest home.

This week’s lots are stocked on Tokopedia and Shopee — or message us on WhatsApp and we’ll help you pick a roast.

T
Tokopedia

Browse our full lineup and order for delivery anywhere in Indonesia.

Visit our store
S
Shopee

Same lineup, same freshness — checkout through Shopee if that’s easier for you.

Visit our store
W
WhatsApp

Not sure what to pick? Message us directly and we’ll walk you through this week’s roast.

Chat with us
01

Traceability

Every lot names the grower, the village, and the wet mill. We buy what we have walked.

02

Micro-batch Roasting

9kg at a time, profiled by hand. Small enough to chase the sweetness in each origin.

03

Sensory Excellence

Cupped, scored, and dialled in our lab before a single bag reaches the bar.

The Bar & Lab

Twelve seats. One pour at a time.

Our reservation-only slow bar seats twelve, in four private sessions a day — the room is never shared with other guests. Each session is a guided journey through the week’s lots, brewed slowly and talked through gently.

Reserve a Slow Bar Seat
Visit the Bar & Lab
Address

Jl. Paradise 14, Blok M No.13, RT.3/RW.19,
Sunter Agung, Tanjung Priok,
Jakarta Utara, DKI Jakarta 14350

Open in Google Maps →
Sessions

Open daily, by reservation only — four private sessions:

12.00–14.00  ·  14.30–16.30
17.00–19.00  ·  19.30–21.30

No walk-ins outside special events. Reserve via WhatsApp or Instagram DM.

For cafés & green buyers

Pour our origins
in your house.

International café owners and green buyers — we’ll send a curated export sample kit of this season’s lots, with full traceability sheets and roast notes.

ships worldwide
Let’s talk wholesale

Five 100g samples · traceability dossier · indicative FOB pricing. No cost for qualified buyers.

Message us on WhatsApp or email rootsandacre@gmail.com

The bridge between Indonesia’s coffee farmers and the people who love what they grow.
